---
title: All crossref types
---

## Introduction {#sec-intro}

See @sec-intro for the overview, @fig-plot for the figure, @tbl-data for the
table, @eq-var for the equation, and @thm-line for the theorem.

![A simple plot.](plot.png){#fig-plot}

| Column A | Column B |
|----------|----------|
| 1        | 2        |

: A small table. {#tbl-data}

$$
\sigma^2 = \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N (x_i - \mu)^2
$$ {#eq-var}

::: {#thm-line}
## Line

The equation of a straight line is $y = mx + b$.
:::
